name: Alpine Mushroom Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup porcini mushrooms, cut into large pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. On a sheet pan, place the mushrooms, garlic, and olive oil. Toss.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Bake in the oven until light brown, about 20-25 minutes.
5. Remove from the oven and toss with remaining ingredients.
6. Keep at room temperature.
